# AccessoryError.invalidNotificationResponse

**Case**

An error that indicates the system failed to handle a notification response.

## Declaration

```swift
case invalidNotificationResponse
```

## Discussion

The [doc://com.apple.accessorynotifications/documentation/AccessoryNotifications/AccessoryNotificationManaging] protocol’s [doc://com.apple.accessorynotifications/documentation/AccessoryNotifications/AccessoryNotificationManaging/sendResponse(_:for:)] method can throw an error of this type.

## Response errors

- **AccessoryError.unableToGetUserResponse**: An error that indicates the system is unable to handle a notification response.
